creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ganael-

The distfile that is hosted on sourceforge and jenkinssoftware.com  
have different checksums. I grabbed a copy of both and compared them
and it seems like while the versions are correct, the distfile from  
sourceforge has additional files that are not in distfile provided by  
jenkinssoftware.com
In addition, the checksums of certian files differ as well.

Cn you please figure out which is the "correct" distfile to use?

Also, it is not necessary to gzip and uuencode patches. Simply  
submitting plaintext unified diffs is very much appreciated. Thanks

--
Steven Kreuzer
http://www.exit2shell.com/~skreuzer
